# TL;DR News

> Daily AI-generated news intelligence across World, Business, Technology,
> Sports, and Science — distilled for fast decision-making.

TL;DR News is an automated pipeline that fetches top RSS headlines daily from
authoritative sources (BBC News, The Guardian, The Verge, ESPN, ScienceDaily),
runs sentiment analysis, and produces structured AI reports (GPT-4o-mini).
Reports include executive summaries, key themes, notable headlines with signal
labels (Opportunity / Risk / Unclear), 24–72h and 1–4wk future outlooks, and
source caveats.

## Reports

- [Latest daily report](/news/reports.html) — full interactive reader
- [Report index JSON](/news/data/reports_index.json) — machine-readable list of
  available dates (last 45 days)

## Data API

Daily reports are available as structured JSON:
`/news/data/reports/YYYY-MM-DD.json`

Each report contains: date, model used, UTC generation timestamp, and per-category
objects with source metadata, sentiment scores, and a full AI-generated report
object (summary, key_themes, notable_headlines, future_outlook, caveats).

## Categories

- **World** — BBC News world RSS
- **Business** — The Guardian business RSS
- **Technology** — The Verge RSS
- **Sports** — ESPN RSS
- **Science** — ScienceDaily top science RSS

## About

TL;DR News is built for readers who need fast, accurate situational awareness
without spending hours reading the news. Content is generated programmatically;
all source links point to original journalism.
